cards.title: Formal Methods
cards.governance_note: State the specification, assumptions, proof obligations, and verification scope.

cards.title: Machine-Checked Reasoning
cards.governance_note: Preserve checked proof objects, solver results, model-checking traces, and open obligations.

cards.title: Counterexample Evidence
cards.governance_note: Keep counterexamples and failed obligations visible rather than suppressing them.

cards.title: Verification Governance
cards.governance_note: Distinguish proved, checked, bounded, unknown, failed, and out-of-scope claims.
